title: Mario Minecart
description: Add a fun twist to your Minecraft experience with the Mario Minecart texture!
body:
![minecart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abea71a406d2f25d870c1ea01b95fa8e9b4bd8e6_0.webp)

Mario Minecart 🏎️✨

Add a fun twist to your Minecraft experience with the Mario Minecart texture! Now, your minecart transforms into Mario's iconic car from Mario Kart. 🚗💨 Feel the thrill of racing as you travel the tracks in style! 🌟🏁

🔧 Important: OptiFine is required for proper functionality! 🔥

Get ready for a ride full of fun and nostalgia! 🎮✨
